transcript: 4 medium-sized potatoes peel them and then wash cut these potatoes in a long manner and wash like this take a cotton cloth and till it's wet make it dry take a cotton cloth and make it dry when the potatoes get dried add 2 tbsp cornflour or other road after cornflour add one tablespoon or half salt according to taste now next we add red chili for texture add some color to it, red or orange to feel your like, then mix well, so that cornflour will stick up all the potatoes, like this. Besides take a pan and add some oil. This oil is for deep frying the potatoes wait till it get dry or get hot check whether the oil gets hot or not no not now now the oil is accurately hot now the potatoes become dark brown take them off into a plate with tissue for serving, these are yummy, potatoes are ready. For more taste add add chaat masala over it after plating serve our potatoes
